message:
fix(interactive): simplify bash command parser + fix usage tracking and abort cleanup

Three independent fixes in the interactive shell:

parse_bash_command(): Replaced nested if/else chain with idiomatic
strip_prefix chaining — same behaviour, less nesting, easier to read.

Usage accumulation: Changed destructuring move to ref borrow when
updating total_usage, then extracted the addition into a dedicated
add_usage() helper to avoid field-by-field repetition.

Abort cleanup: Reset extension_streaming flag on agent abort/error
to prevent the streaming indicator from getting stuck after an
interrupted extension operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
